findings.description: The full class name `nablarch.test.tool.htmlcheck.HtmlChecker` (the HtmlChecker interface) is referenced in the source as `nablarch.test.tool.htmlcheck.HtmlChecker インタフェース` but only the short form `HtmlChecker` appears in hints. Other full class names (e.g., `nablarch.test.core.http.HttpTestConfiguration`, `nablarch.test.tool.htmlcheck.Html4HtmlChecker`) are correctly included with full package paths, making this inconsistent.
findings.source_evidence: オブジェクトは nablarch.test.tool.htmlcheck.HtmlChecker インタフェースを実装している必要がある。
